articles.author: Sophie McEvoy
articles.title: Nvidia CEO says critics are "completely wrong" about DLSS 5 technology - GamesIndustry.biz
articles.description: Following concerns that upscaling feature detracts from creative expression, Jensen Huang says it "doesn't change artistic control"
articles.content:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang responded to backlash over DLSS 5 upscaling technology, saying critics are "completely wrong" and that it "doesn't change artistic control."
Earlier this week, Nvidia reveale… [+1317 chars]

articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: EU offers to pay Ukraine to fix oil pipeline at the center of Ukraine-Hungary feud - NPR
articles.description: EU officials say they have offered money and technical help to Ukraine to fix a key oil pipeline to Central Europe. They hope that will persuade Hungary to drop its veto on major aid to Ukraine.
articles.content: BRUSSELS Top European Union officials said Tuesday they have offered to pay Ukraine to repair a damaged pipeline meant to carry crude oil to Hungary, in a bid to persuade the government in Budapest t… [+3297 chars]
